'''''Jeffrey''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was supplied in the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] by the [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] [[Magnus (starship)|''Magnus'']] in order to man the [[AX-235]] outpost, and was also delivered some stolen [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[communications satellite]]s by the [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] ''[[Ojai]]''.

An Imperial force consisting of four transports, escorted by [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wings]], attacked the rendezvous but were defeated by [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Puck Naeco/Legends|Puck Naeco]], allowing the transfer to take place.

The ''Jeffrey'' then replaced several Imperial satellites with the Rebel ones to monitor Imperial communications and report to listening post AX-235. The satellites proved essential in discovering the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] project.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
